overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a medieval stone courtyard garden featuring a central circular fountain surrounded by lush vegetation and historic walls. Colorful butterflies flutter through the air around the fountain where a statue stands, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic courtyard garden with central fountain

events.description: large orange and black butterfly flies extremely close to camera, temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the courtyard fountain and garden

notable_agents.action: colorful butterflies fluttering around the fountain and through the courtyard

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with water basin and central statue
tall historic stone walls enclosing the courtyard with crenellations
tall leafy trees surrounding the courtyard perimeter
bushes with white blossoms lining the courtyard edge
purple flowering plants in the foreground garden beds
ornate black metal lantern on stone post
distant mountains visible beyond the courtyard walls
statue or figure standing in the center of the fountain

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a serene medieval stone courtyard garden centered around a circular fountain. Lush vegetation including tall trees, white flowering bushes, and purple lavender surrounds the cobblestone plaza. Colorful butterflies flutter throughout the scene, with one large butterfly approaching the camera near the end of the clip. Historic stone walls and distant mountains form the backdrop under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a serene, stationary perspective of a medieval stone courtyard garden that gradually becomes more intimate as nature draws closer. It begins with a wide view of a circular fountain centered within a cobblestone plaza, framed by lush white flowering bushes, purple lavender, and towering trees. As the camera lingers, the backdrop of historic stone walls and distant mountains remains steady under a partly cloudy sky. The scene then shifts in focus as colorful butterflies flutter through the air, culminating in a single large butterfly that glides forward to approach the lens.
